textByHashes.e7c60ff188305bee98caaf768befaffeed764d50: I'm worried. I think the Council is neglecting a big issue. I tried to bring it up at the last meeting, but they didn't pay attention.
textByHashes.5020d9579938d74facbfa8b260d40ca00f2d972d: I'm very happy for you humans to come down to the city, but what about...them?
textByHashes.b7ba490d9ba8044ff5f46b1a3911254ece3d979f: Don't say it! What if they hear?
textByHashes.83444eec10b85102a8c57261327e3eca941d1659: Because they're so powerful, of course!
textByHashes.b3a4514c1e1f2e8f6446eca9ea0d8f59e2214464: In the time of the great war, they forced all the goblin tribes to fight one another. Our ancestors weren't powerful enough to stand up to them.
textByHashes.771c66657f411bb15afa831b24f3ce96f5dcb093: We've hidden down here for this long, but now the way to the surface is open, what if they find us again?
textByHashes.daf0bf924e3f47b35628d87d41e67d0e740b1767: I do hope you're right! I still can't help being worried, though.
textByHashes.59af9f125b6c3b562f2fb6f3745c4ee085508907: No! How could you even suggest that? We're not going to worship some supernatural being just because it's bigger and more powerful than us.
textByHashes.f302d99179c94e899396685a9113f5e4b5671b62: It may seem to you that we're cowardly, hiding here from the gods all this time, but I know that every Dorgeshuun would rather die than submit to the rule of any god.
